questions.prompt: Visit the OpenAI GPT-5 for developers page and the GPT-4.1 page. Compare the Scale MultiChallenge (o3-mini grader) scores for GPT-5(high) and GPT-4.1. Answer the absolute difference in percentage points using one decimal place.
questions.answer_format_hint: Return only the number, for example 23.4.

questions.prompt: Visit the OpenAI GPT-5.1 for developers page and the GPT-5 for developers page. Compare the Tau²-bench telecom scores for GPT-5.1(high) and GPT-5(high). Answer the absolute difference in percentage points using one decimal place.
questions.answer_format_hint: Return only the number, for example 1.1.

questions.prompt: Visit the Python http.server documentation page. The --directory option was added in version 3.7 and --protocol was added in version 3.11. How many minor versions apart are they?

Visit the DeepSeek Models & Pricing page and the Qwen-Long page. DeepSeek-V4-Pro has a 1M context length, while qwen-long has a 10,000,000-token context length. How many times larger is qwen-long's context window?

Visit the DeepSeek Models & Pricing page. For DeepSeek-V4-Pro on the Chinese pricing page, compare the output price per million tokens with the cache-hit input price per million tokens. How many times larger is the output price?
Visit the Qwen-Long page. Subtract the model's maximum output from its context length. Answer the exact integer difference in tokens.
questions.answer_format_hint: Use a decimal integer with no separators.

questions.prompt: Visit the Qwen Code configuration page. Qwen Code starts with 8K output tokens and retries with 64K tokens if the response is truncated. What is the retry multiplier relative to the initial limit?

Visit the National Bureau of Statistics page for 2024 social retail sales. Compare the annual growth rates of 家用电器和音像器材类 (12.3) and 体育、娱乐用品类 (11.1). Answer the difference in percentage points using one decimal place.
questions.answer_format_hint: Return only the number, for example 1.2.

questions.prompt: Visit the National Bureau of Statistics 2024 national economic and social development statistical communique. The year-end population aged 0-14 is 22240万人 and the population aged 15-59 is 87557万人. Answer the difference in 万人.
Visit the 2025 National Postal Work Conference page. It states that 2024 postal delivery volume was 1930亿件 and express delivery volume was 1745亿件. Answer the difference in 亿件.
